Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 17}You can guard against an enemy's attack by pressing {f 1 3 999}. Guarding will reduce damage by half.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Guarding can also keep you from getting knocked down even if an enemy targets your weakness. You will not be afflicted with status ailments while guarding either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If an enemy is winding up for a powerful attack, or if you think your weakness will be targeted, try guarding to play it safe.[n]{f 1 1}
